shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch beside two identical story format UI frames showing the same format at different audience scales
assets.caption: Hatch beside two identical story format UI frames showing the same format at different audience scales
assets.prompt: WhatsApp Status | hero: Hatch mascot (HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing next to two identical story format UI frames — one labeled with an older year and a smaller audience icon, one labeled with a newer year and a much larger audience icon. The format is identical; the scale is different. Cream background, no text overlays. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing between an innovative small team and a massive network deploying the same format at different scales
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing between an innovative small team and a massive network deploying the same format at different scales
assets.prompt: WhatsApp Status | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a comparison: on one side a small but innovative team launching a new format to a modest audience; on the other side a massive established network with the same format reaching its entire existing user base. The scene conveys the asymmetry between invention and distribution. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.

assets.alt: Hatch observing a bar chart comparing the innovator's user count to the distributor's nine-month count
assets.caption: Hatch observing a bar chart comparing the innovator's user count to the distributor's nine-month count
assets.prompt: WhatsApp Status | failure-mechanism: Hatch in a thinking pose, observing a simple bar chart: one bar labeled with a smaller count (the innovator's audience), one bar labeled with a much larger count (the distributor's audience after nine months). The bars are dramatically different heights. The format label is the same. Cream background. Watermark same. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch pointing at a comparison showing WhatsApp Status daily active users exceeding Snapchat's total user count
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at a comparison showing WhatsApp Status daily active users exceeding Snapchat's total user count
assets.prompt: WhatsApp Status | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a timeline showing two data points: Snapchat Stories total users versus WhatsApp Status daily active users at the nine-month mark after Status launch. The WhatsApp number is larger. Simple, clean comparison. Cream background. Watermark same. Aspect 1600x1000. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch beside a diagram showing a small invention connected to a large distribution network
assets.caption: Hatch beside a diagram showing a small invention connected to a large distribution network
assets.prompt: WhatsApp Status | lesson-frame: Hatch in a coaching pose, calm, standing beside a simple diagram: an invention (a lightbulb) on one side connected by an arrow to a distribution network (a web of people icons) on the other. The network is much larger than the lightbulb. The lesson is about the relative size of the two advantages. Cream background. Watermark same. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
